gold.name: Stella ET Plush
gold.highlight: Handcrafted luxury from HZ Sleep. The Stella pairs natural Talalay latex, New Zealand wool, and individually-pocketed zoned coils with a hand-tufted Tencel cooling cover for a premium, temperature-neutral sleep experience.

reasons.default: Handcrafted luxury from HZ Sleep, the Stella pairs natural Talalay latex, New Zealand wool, and individually-pocketed zoned coils with a hand-tufted Tencel cooling cover for a premium, temperature-neutral sleep experience.

reasons.support: Individually-pocketed zoned coils with 25% more support through the middle third, plus Deluxe Edge Support foam encasement
reasons.durability: Hand-tufted construction, Talalay latex, and tempered zoned coils (2015 in Queen) built to last a lifetime
reasons.plush: Cloud-like plush euro top feel with Talalay latex and New Zealand wool — ideal for side sleepers and pressure-point relief
reasons.motionIsolation: Individually-pocketed zoned coils plus Nano micro-coils minimize partner disturbance
reasons.pressureRelief: Talalay latex and Serene Specialty Foam deliver 30% more pressure relief with responsive contouring
